query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
-- LED202 Lesson 1: Biblical Foundations of Leadership (360051)
(360051, 'Servant leadership is modeled primarily by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Roman emperors","Jesus Christ","Greek philosophers","Modern CEOs"]', 'Jesus Christ', 1),
(360051, 'In John 13, Jesus demonstrated servant leadership by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Demanding service","Washing the disciples feet","Asserting authority","Refusing to serve"]', 'Washing the disciples feet', 2),
(360051, 'The qualifications for elders in 1 Timothy 3 emphasize:', 'multiple_choice', '["Wealth and status","Character and spiritual maturity","Education only","Age only"]', 'Character and spiritual maturity', 3),
(360051, 'Moses leadership style included:', 'multiple_choice', '["Doing everything alone","Delegating to capable leaders","Avoiding responsibility","Seeking personal glory"]', 'Delegating to capable leaders', 4),
(360051, 'The shepherd metaphor for leadership emphasizes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Domination","Care, protection, and guidance","Distance from followers","Self-interest"]', 'Care, protection, and guidance', 5),
(360051, 'Nehemiahs leadership demonstrated:', 'multiple_choice', '["Lack of planning","Vision, prayer, and strategic action","Avoidance of conflict","Solo work"]', 'Vision, prayer, and strategic action', 6),
(360051, 'According to 1 Peter 5:3, leaders should not be:', 'multiple_choice', '["Examples to the flock","Lords over those entrusted to them","Humble servants","Willing shepherds"]', 'Lords over those entrusted to them', 7),
(360051, 'Pauls leadership included:', 'multiple_choice', '["Working alone","Mentoring and developing other leaders","Avoiding relationships","Seeking fame"]', 'Mentoring and developing other leaders', 8),
(360051, 'The greatest among you shall be your:', 'multiple_choice', '["Master","Servant","King","Judge"]', 'Servant', 9),
(360051, 'Spiritual leadership differs from secular leadership in its:', 'multiple_choice', '["Techniques only","Source of authority and ultimate purpose","Rejection of all principles","Identical approach"]', 'Source of authority and ultimate purpose', 10),
(360051, 'Explain the biblical model of servant leadership and how it differs from worldly leadership models.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Biblical servant leadership prioritizes others needs, follows Christs example, and seeks Gods glory rather than personal gain.', 11),

-- LED202 Lesson 2: Developing Leadership Skills (360052)
(360052, 'Emotional intelligence in leadership includes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignoring emotions","Self-awareness and relationship management","Suppressing feelings","Emotional manipulation"]', 'Self-awareness and relationship management', 1),
(360052, 'Effective communication requires:', 'multiple_choice', '["Speaking only","Listening, clarity, and appropriate channels","Avoiding feedback","One-way messaging"]', 'Listening, clarity, and appropriate channels', 2),
(360052, 'Conflict resolution in Christian leadership should:', 'multiple_choice', '["Avoid all conflict","Seek reconciliation and truth in love","Win at all costs","Ignore problems"]', 'Seek reconciliation and truth in love', 3),
(360052, 'Vision casting involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Keeping plans secret","Communicating a compelling future direction","Avoiding change","Maintaining status quo"]', 'Communicating a compelling future direction', 4),
(360052, 'Team building requires:', 'multiple_choice', '["Uniformity","Recognizing diverse gifts and fostering unity","Competition within team","Isolation"]', 'Recognizing diverse gifts and fostering unity', 5),
(360052, 'Decision-making for leaders should include:', 'multiple_choice', '["Impulsive choices","Prayer, wisdom, and counsel","Avoiding decisions","Following popular opinion only"]', 'Prayer, wisdom, and counsel', 6),
(360052, 'Time management for leaders involves:', 'multiple_choice', '["Doing everything yourself","Prioritizing and delegating appropriately","Avoiding schedules","Constant busyness"]', 'Prioritizing and delegating appropriately', 7),
(360052, 'Accountability in leadership means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Answering to no one","Being responsible to God and others","Avoiding transparency","Self-sufficiency"]', 'Being responsible to God and others', 8),
(360052, 'Developing others is important because:', 'multiple_choice', '["It threatens your position","It multiplies ministry impact and ensures succession","It wastes time","Leaders should work alone"]', 'It multiplies ministry impact and ensures succession', 9),
(360052, 'Self-care for leaders includes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Burnout as a badge of honor","Rest, renewal, and spiritual disciplines","Ignoring personal needs","Constant work"]', 'Rest, renewal, and spiritual disciplines', 10),
(360052, 'Identify three key leadership skills and explain how each contributes to effective ministry.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Key skills include communication, vision casting, and team building, each contributing to unified and effective ministry.', 11),

-- WOR101 Lesson 1: Biblical Foundations of Worship (360081)
(360081, 'The Hebrew word shachah primarily means:', 'multiple_choice', '["To sing","To bow down or prostrate","To clap","To dance"]', 'To bow down or prostrate', 1),
(360081, 'True worship according to John 4:24 must be in:', 'multiple_choice', '["A specific location","Spirit and truth","Hebrew only","Silence only"]', 'Spirit and truth', 2),
(360081, 'The first commandment establishes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Worship of many gods","Exclusive worship of the one true God","Optional worship","Worship of creation"]', 'Exclusive worship of the one true God', 3),
(360081, 'In Romans 12:1, living sacrifice refers to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Animal sacrifice","Offering our whole lives as worship","Physical death","Temple rituals"]', 'Offering our whole lives as worship', 4),
(360081, 'The Psalms demonstrate worship through:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only praise","Praise, lament, thanksgiving, and petition","Silence only","Ritual only"]', 'Praise, lament, thanksgiving, and petition', 5),
(360081, 'Worship in the tabernacle/temple emphasized:', 'multiple_choice', '["Casual approach","Gods holiness and proper approach to Him","Human creativity only","Entertainment"]', 'Gods holiness and proper approach to Him', 6),
(360081, 'The Greek word proskuneo means:', 'multiple_choice', '["To sing loudly","To kiss toward or worship reverently","To dance","To speak"]', 'To kiss toward or worship reverently', 7),
(360081, 'Corporate worship in the early church included:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only preaching","Word, prayer, fellowship, and Lords Supper","Entertainment focus","Individual isolation"]', 'Word, prayer, fellowship, and Lords Supper', 8),
(360081, 'The object of Christian worship is:', 'multiple_choice', '["The worship experience","The Triune God alone","Music styles","Human leaders"]', 'The Triune God alone', 9),
(360081, 'Worship is ultimately about:', 'multiple_choice', '["Our preferences","Glorifying God and enjoying Him","Entertainment","Self-expression only"]', 'Glorifying God and enjoying Him', 10),
(360081, 'Explain the biblical definition of worship and its implications for personal and corporate practice.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Biblical worship involves whole-life devotion to God, expressed in spirit and truth, both personally and corporately.', 11),

-- WOR101 Lesson 2: Elements of Corporate Worship (360082)
(360082, 'The regulative principle of worship states:', 'multiple_choice', '["Anything goes in worship","Only what Scripture commands or implies is permitted","Tradition determines worship","Personal preference rules"]', 'Only what Scripture commands or implies is permitted', 2),
(360082, 'The reading of Scripture in worship is important because:', 'multiple_choice', '["It fills time","It is Gods Word speaking to His people","It is optional","It replaces preaching"]', 'It is Gods Word speaking to His people', 3),
(360082, 'Prayer in corporate worship should include:', 'multiple_choice', '["Only requests","Adoration, confession, thanksgiving, and supplication","Performance","Entertainment"]', 'Adoration, confession, thanksgiving, and supplication', 4),
(360082, 'The Lords Supper commemorates:', 'multiple_choice', '["A regular meal","Christs death and the new covenant","Jewish Passover only","Church membership"]', 'Christs death and the new covenant', 5),
(360082, 'Baptism in worship signifies:', 'multiple_choice', '["Nothing spiritual","Union with Christ in death and resurrection","Church membership only","Water purification"]', 'Union with Christ in death and resurrection', 6),
(360082, 'The offering in worship represents:', 'multiple_choice', '["Obligation only","Grateful response and participation in Gods work","Payment for services","Optional extra"]', 'Grateful response and participation in Gods work', 7),
(360082, 'Preaching in worship should:', 'multiple_choice', '["Entertain","Proclaim and apply Gods Word faithfully","Share opinions","Avoid Scripture"]', 'Proclaim and apply Gods Word faithfully', 8),
(360082, 'The benediction serves to:', 'multiple_choice', '["End the service quickly","Send the congregation with Gods blessing","Fill time","Dismiss casually"]', 'Send the congregation with Gods blessing', 9),
(360082, 'Congregational singing serves to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Showcase talent","Unite believers in praise and teach truth","Entertain","Replace preaching"]', 'Unite believers in praise and teach truth', 10),
(360082, 'The call to worship functions to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Start on time","Summon Gods people into His presence","Perform music","Test sound equipment"]', 'Summon Gods people into His presence', 1),
(360082, 'Describe the essential elements of corporate worship and explain the purpose of each.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Essential elements include Scripture reading, prayer, preaching, sacraments, singing, and offering, each serving to glorify God and edify believers.', 11);
command:

(360082, 'The regulative principle of worship states:', 'multiple_choice', '["Anything goes in worship","Only what Scripture commands or implies is permitted","Tradition determines worship","Personal preference rules"]', 'Only what Scripture commands or implies is permitted', 2),
